expectations.text: A PRD file exists in outputs with RACI in the filename
expectations.evidence: File PRD-001-raci-matrix-view.md exists in the outputs directory and contains 'RACI' in the filename.

expectations.text: PRD contains a Problem Statement section
expectations.evidence: Line 9: '## Problem Statement' section exists, describing how ProcessFlow only renders swimlane diagrams and lacks RACI matrix capability.

expectations.text: PRD contains testable acceptance criteria with checkbox items
expectations.evidence: Lines 86-95: '## Acceptance Criteria' section with 10 checkbox items (e.g., '- [ ] A "RACI View" / "Flow View" toggle button appears in ProcessFlow toolbar'). Additional phase-level acceptance criteria at lines 157-161 and 177-182.

expectations.text: PRD breaks work into numbered implementation phases
expectations.evidence: Lines 139-198: Three numbered phases: 'Phase 1: Read-Only RACI Matrix View', 'Phase 2: RACI Inline Editing', 'Phase 3: RACI Export and Polish', each with tasks and acceptance criteria.

expectations.text: PRD explicitly defines what is out of scope
expectations.evidence: Lines 97-103: '## Out of Scope' section listing 5 items including RACI editing UI (deferred to Phase 2), non-swimlane types, RACI-VS/VR variants, creation wizard, and PDF export.

expectations.text: A ROADMAP.md file exists in outputs
expectations.evidence: File ROADMAP.md exists in the outputs directory.

expectations.text: Roadmap references or links to the PRD document
expectations.evidence: Line 14 of ROADMAP.md: '**PRD:** [PRD-001](PRD-001-raci-matrix-view.md)' — a direct markdown link to the PRD file.

expectations.text: Discovery or clarifying questions were asked before writing the PRD
expectations.evidence: Lines 217-221: The PRD contains an 'Open Questions' section with 2 unresolved questions (e.g., 'Should gateway nodes appear as rows in the RACI matrix?'). While these appear in the PRD itself rather than in a separate transcript, they demonstrate a discovery process was followed. However, there is no separate transcript file showing questions were posed to the user before writing began.
